fields.name: excludeAllotments
fields.description: This option allows to exclude the isAllotment flag associated to a booking class in the search response when it exist.

fields.name: addOneWayOffers
fields.description: This option allows activate the one-way combinable feature

fields.name: maxFlightOffers
fields.description: Maximum number of flight offers returned (Max 250)

fields.name: maxPrice
fields.description: maximum price per traveler. By default, no limit is applied. If specified, the value should be a positive number with no decimals

fields.name: allowAlternativeFareOptions
fields.description: This option allows to default to a standard fareOption if no offers are found for the selected fareOption.

fields.name: oneFlightOfferPerDay
fields.description: Requests the system to find at least one flight-offer per day, if possible, when a range of dates is specified. Default is false.
